title: Application - Uninstall mobile application
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app can be successfully uninstalled from the device via long-press and Remove option
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Studio Mobile app is installed and visible on the device home screen.
2. Long-press the Poly Studio Mobile app icon.
4. Confirm the uninstall action when prompted.
5. Verify that the Poly Studio Mobile app icon is no longer present on the device home screen or app drawer.
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app is uninstalled successfully and no longer appears on the device.
